zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Chute於1354年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾明日香 密爾時，她的父親George le Chute36歲，母親Theo Tirrell32歲。她於1383年與Ralph de Meynell在英國英格蘭德比夏爾柯克 明日香結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Chute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Chute in Wiltshire, from Celtic cēd ‘wood’. Compare Welsh coed. This name is also relatively common in Ireland.
Americanized form of German Schütt, a variant of Schütte (see Schutte ).

variants.name: Schutte
meanings: North German (mainly Schütte): occupational name for an archer, from Middle Low German schutten ‘to shoot’. Compare Schuetz .
Dutch: variant of   Schut  , a cognate of 1 above.

Germanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Šute, and probably also of its cognate Šutej (see Shutey ). In part, it is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). The surname Šute has died out in Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Chute was born in 1354, in Langley Mill, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, George le Chute, was 36 and her mother, Theo Tirrell, was 32. She married Ralph de Meynell in 1383, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1397, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana Chute est née en 1354, à Langley Mill, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George le Chute, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Theo Tirrell, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Meynell en 1383, à Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1397, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Sie hat 1383 in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Meynell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Chute è nata il nel 1354 nel Langley Mill, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, George le Chute, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Theo Tirrell, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Meynell nel 1383, nel Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1397, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana Chuteが1354年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアラングリー ミルで生まれた時，父George le Chuteは36歳，母Theo Tirrellは32歳であった。1383年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーでRalph de Meynellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Chute(이)가 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 랭글리 미에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George le Chute(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Theo Tirrell(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 Ralph de Meynell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Chute родилась в 1354 г. в местности лангли милл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George le Chute было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Theo Tirrell, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Meynell в 1383 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1397 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christiana Chute nació en 1354, en Langley Mill, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George le Chute, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Theo Tirrell, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Ralph de Meynell en 1383, en Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1397, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
